title: Flashing Bouncy Batons (Pack of 3) - Light Up Spiky Ball Wand, Colours Sent at Random, Sensory Toy for Children, Tap on Hard Surface to Activate, Ideal for Parties and Disco, OCD ADHD & Autism
features: 🔵🟢🟠🟡 FANTASTIC FLASHING BATONS - These brilliant bright light-up batons come in an array of vibrant, eye-catching colours, pink, green, blue, orange, purple and yellow (sent at random). They add fun and charm to any occasion and are party favourites of children everywhere!

🔵🟢🟠🟡 EASY TO ACTIVATE - Activating these bouncy batons is a quick and easy process, simply tap the ball attached to the end of the baton on a hard surface and it will immediately activate the mesmerising light show. The lights flash for approximately 15 seconds so you can watch in wonder as they burst into colourful brilliance!

🔵🟢🟠🟡 MADE FROM SAFE AND DURABLE MATERIALS - Your safety is our top priority so we made sure that these products are crafted with high-quality, child-safe materials. The toys are CE certified which means they have met rigorous health, safety and environmental protection requirements. This ensures the toys are built to withstand hours of fun and creative playtime!

🔵🟢🟠🟡 GREAT SENSORY TOY FOR CHILDREN - We designed these balls with a spiky texture which appeals to children of all ages as they love to feel the inviting spikes on each baton. The mesmerizing lights can also offer a soothing sensory experience, making these batons a valuable tool for children with sensory processing differences

🔵🟢🟠🟡 INCLUDED IN THIS PACKAGE - In each package, you will receive a pack of three flashing bouncy batons. Each baton measures approximately 23 x 6cm (9 x 2.36") in size and are guaranteed to delight and amaze your children when they are brought out at a party or for playtime at home. Please Note: This product is not suitable for children under the age of 3
